items.image_prompt: A dynamic and energetic vertical 9:16 social media poster showing a symbolic motorsport track scene with a smartphone in the foreground displaying the text 'Race Weekend Energy' in English. The tone is fan hype with warm modern atmosphere, subtle glowing music notes and sound waves around the phone. No official logos, badges, real athlete faces or trademarked visuals. Suitable for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and Facebook.
items.reels_text: Feel the thrill of the British Grand Prix at Silverstone! #RaceWeekendEnergy #Melody4U #MusicGift #PersonalWish #GiftIdea #ForTheFans
